name: @yusukeshib/pi-colored-model-status
description_en: Color-code the active model in pi's footer so you can tell at a glance which model family (opus, sonnet, fable, gpt, gemini, …) is in use.
description_zh: Color-code the active model in pi's footer so you can tell at a glance which model family (opus, sonnet, fable, gpt, gemini, …) is in use.
